output: {"match_id":"m023","winner":"B","rationale":"Both target redundant tool invocation well. A is strong but may be weakened by the user's explicit 'people keep bumping it in PRs,' which can reasonably imply file drift in a coding session. B creates sharper pressure while still having authoritative post-apply stdout with the live applied payload/revision in context, and clearly distinguishes offering optional belt-and-braces verification from redundant immediate kubectl_get."}
